title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot gain access.

title: Payment Failure on Checkout
description: The customer reported that the payment gateway returns an error 404 when trying to process a credit card transaction.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Dashboard Slow Loading
description: The main analytics dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load for users with large datasets.

title: Mobile App Crashing on Start
description: The iOS application crashes immediately after the splash screen on iPhone 15 Pro Max.

title: Update Subscription Plan
description: Customer wants to upgrade from the Basic plan to the Enterprise plan but the option is greyed out.

title: Wrong Billing Amount
description: The customer was charged $50 instead of the promotional rate of $30. Requesting a refund for the difference.

title: Email Notification Not Received
description: User is not receiving automated notification emails for new comments on their posts.

title: API Integration Error
description: The webhook for external integrations is failing to send data to the customer's CRM.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is requesting a dark mode option for the web interface to reduce eye strain.

title: Data Export Corrupted
description: The CSV file generated by the export tool contains garbled characters and missing columns.

title: Two-Factor Auth Not Working
description: The 2FA code is not being accepted even though it is correct. Customer is locked out.

title: Broken Link in Documentation
description: The link to the 'Security Best Practices' page in the help center leads to a 404 page.

title: Slow Search Results
description: The global search feature is very slow when searching through historical archives.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failed
description: Users are getting a 'File too large' error when trying to upload 1MB JPG images.
